title: crataegus microphylla var. dolichocarpa
intro: Crataegus microphylla var. dolichocarpa, also known as the hawthorn, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Rosaceae. The medicinal properties of C. microphylla var. dolichocarpa lie in its leaves, flowers, and fruits, which have been traditionally used to treat cardiovascular issues, such as high blood pressure and heart failure, due to their ability to dilate blood vessels and improve circulation. The health benefits of this plant include reducing the risk of heart disease, lowering cholesterol levels, and improving overall cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of C. microphylla var. dolichocarpa include tea, capsules, and tinctures, which can be used to support heart health and promote overall well-being.
